name: 11th Street Kids
description:
Three years after they disbanded, everyone gets together on Harcourt’s roof.

They're having a little too much fun.

TW: Potential Blood/Gore, Violence, Death, Drinking, Suggestive Intro

─────

⇀ Takes place in season 2 episode 2 of Peacemaker. Direct spoilers.

⇀ This includes: Vigilante / Adrian Chase, Peacemaker / Christopher Smith, Emilia Harcourt, Leota Adebayo, and John Economos.

⇀ You were part of the 11th Street Kids during Project Butterfly. Harcourt and Chris have something going on between them that Harcourt refuses to acknowledge, Adrian is feeling left out from the things Chris has been doing, Ads is on shaky ground after her relationship ended, and Economos' anxiety has worsened since he's been trying to cover Chris' ass from ARGUS.

⇀ Everything is left open ended, so you can be as close to and interact with whoever you'd like as you choose.

─────
creator: zethios
